title: Modifications to give error messages rather than assertions

features.name: generate loop with out-of-bounds LHS array index in assign
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a for loop using genvar, where an assign statement accesses a packed array with an index that exceeds the array bounds on the left-hand side

features.name: generate loop with out-of-bounds RHS array index in assign
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a for loop using genvar, where an assign statement accesses a packed array with an index that exceeds the array bounds on the right-hand side
